description: Authentication card with username, password, forgot-password link, primary sign-in, and secondary SSO entry.
visibleValidationsOrConstraints: Sign In stayed disabled until both required fields were populated.
risks: submit enablement can drift from real validation
SSO and standard auth paths can diverge
functionalScenarios: Primary sign-in uses the entered values.
SSO entry remains reachable.
negativeScenarios: Incomplete input should not submit.
Invalid credentials should not silently navigate.
edgeScenarios: Long email values remain readable.
Browser autofill does not break button state.
accessibilityObservations: Visible labels exist.
Keyboard and error announcement behavior were not fully verified.
notes: Observed before login.

description: Persistent icon-and-label left rail for the major Safety Assistant modules.
visibleValidationsOrConstraints: None visible.
risks: active styling can drift from the route
unread badges can become stale
smokeScenarios: Major routes are visible after login.
functionalScenarios: Active highlighting follows the current route.
Notification badge renders when unread items exist.
negativeScenarios: Broken links should not leave the shell unusable.
Badge text should not overflow badly.
edgeScenarios: Long labels remain readable.
Reloading on a deep route preserves shell state.
accessibilityObservations: Visible text labels accompany icons.
Keyboard order across the full rail was not fully checked.
notes: Observed links: Home, Analytics, Timeline, Observations, Reports, Notification, Help.

description: Top-right avatar trigger that opens account actions such as Change Password and Logout.
visibleValidationsOrConstraints: None visible.
risks: small hit area can be easy to miss
overlay dismissal can feel fragile on rerender
functionalScenarios: Change Password remains reachable.
Logout action is exposed.
negativeScenarios: Menu should not stack duplicate overlays.
Outside click should dismiss cleanly.
edgeScenarios: Long usernames should not break layout.
Repeated open-close cycles remain stable.
accessibilityObservations: Menu text is visible once opened.
Trigger semantics were not fully verified.
notes: Menu displayed the current username plus Change Password and Logout.

description: Recurring top-of-page filter cluster with unit multiselect, date-range picker, and view-specific quick actions.
visibleValidationsOrConstraints: Unit picker exposed Select All plus checkbox options.
Date picker exposed month navigation and a visible selected range.
risks: displayed filters can drift from real query state
overlay placement can clash with other floating UI
functionalScenarios: Changing filters updates surrounding data.
Selections persist while moving between major pages.
negativeScenarios: Invalid or partial range changes should not break the page.
Closing overlays should not apply unintended values.
edgeScenarios: Large unit sets remain usable.
Cross-month and cross-year ranges render cleanly.
accessibilityObservations: The controls expose visible text and checkboxes.
Keyboard multiselect and date navigation were not fully validated.
notes: Analytics console logs suggested selected units and date range are reused.

description: Modal filter surface with zone, category, subcategory, and risk selectors plus Apply, Cancel, and Reset actions.

whereFound.routeOrLocationHint: Filters or Filter button in toolbar

visibleValidationsOrConstraints: Apply stayed disabled until criteria changed.
risks: dependent fields may not clear consistently
dirty-state detection may not match enablement
functionalScenarios: Applying filters narrows the result set.
Cancel closes without mutating the current view.
negativeScenarios: Apply should stay blocked for unchanged selections.
Reset should not leave stale chips or counts behind.
edgeScenarios: Large option sets remain usable.
No-result filters degrade gracefully.
accessibilityObservations: Dialog structure is visible and grouped.
Autofocus behavior needs follow-up.
notes: Only read-only open and close paths were exercised.

description: Summary card showing counts, labels, icons, and sometimes trend deltas or open/closed splits.
visibleValidationsOrConstraints: None visible.
commonActions: use the card as a drill-in trigger where supported
risks: headline totals can drift from detailed lists
color-only cues can become ambiguous
smokeScenarios: Cards render with numbers and labels.
functionalScenarios: Clickable cards open the intended context.
Trend deltas stay aligned with the current period.
negativeScenarios: Zero-state counts should still render legibly.
Missing data should not collapse layout.
edgeScenarios: Very large numbers remain readable.
Negative and positive deltas do not overflow.
accessibilityObservations: Text labels are visible.
Color dependency needs review.
notes: Consolidates dashboard KPIs, analytics summary cards, and notification count cards.

description: Icon-backed category tiles showing category names, counts, and quick drill-in affordances.
visibleValidationsOrConstraints: None visible.
commonActions: open category detail or filtered view
risks: duplicate category labels can confuse users
long category names may wrap unpredictably
smokeScenarios: Tiles render with icon, label, and count.
Clicking a tile uses its drill-in affordance.
functionalScenarios: Tile counts align with the active scope.
Category label and icon remain matched.
negativeScenarios: Missing icons should not break the tile.
Zero-count categories should not appear active without reason.
edgeScenarios: Long names remain readable.
Large counts do not distort alignment.
accessibilityObservations: Text labels are visible.
Icon meaning alone would not be sufficient without text.
notes: The sample dashboard showed repeated labels for some categories.

description: Chart container with a title, optional controls, explanatory text, and a chart or heat-map region.

whereFound.routeOrLocationHint: Risk Trend Analysis, Critical Observations by Hour, Observation Trend, Heat Map

visibleValidationsOrConstraints: Observed embedded comboboxes, toggles, and icon buttons.
risks: narrative text can contradict the chart data
script or worker failures can block rendering
smokeScenarios: Panel renders with title and data region.
Changing panel controls updates the visualization.
functionalScenarios: Selected mode matches the visible data set.
Summary text aligns with the visual.
negativeScenarios: No-data responses should degrade gracefully.
Rendering failures should not break the rest of the page.
edgeScenarios: Large time series remain readable.
Dense labels do not overlap beyond usability.
accessibilityObservations: Titles and summaries are visible.
Non-text chart interpretation was not verified.
notes: Reports also surfaced worker and script issues, but the clearest visualizations were on Dashboard and Analytics.

description: Hierarchical grid with expandable rows, numeric metrics, and inline row-level actions.
visibleValidationsOrConstraints: Observed headers: Location, Observation, Critical Observation, Most Critical Time Period.
risks: expanded state can reset after refresh
dense metrics can become hard to scan
functionalScenarios: Row toggle changes state without losing context.
Inline actions remain aligned to the correct row.
negativeScenarios: Empty child data should not break expansion.
Long cell values should not misalign columns.
edgeScenarios: Many rows remain scrollable.
Mixed positive and negative deltas render consistently.
accessibilityObservations: Treegrid semantics were exposed in the snapshot.
Keyboard row expansion was not confirmed.
notes: One of the clearest structured data components in the portal.

description: Paged horizontal list of recent records with thumbnails, status markers, timestamps, and previous/next controls.
visibleValidationsOrConstraints: Current page index was shown as n / 10.
risks: carousel index can drift after data updates
mixed thumbnail and fallback layouts can misalign cards
smokeScenarios: At least one card opens when clicked.
functionalScenarios: Next/previous controls update the visible page counter.
Cards preserve status and timestamp metadata.
negativeScenarios: Disabled arrows should not navigate.
Missing images should not collapse content.
edgeScenarios: Long observation text wraps cleanly.
Single-page result sets keep sane controls.
accessibilityObservations: Navigation buttons are visible.
Carousel keyboard behavior was not verified.
notes: The page counter changed during inspection, which suggests dynamic paging.

description: Right-side AI assistant panel with chat history, insight prompts, suggested questions, and a conversation input.

whereFound.routeOrLocationHint: EOS Insights panel on the right

visibleValidationsOrConstraints: Send button stayed disabled until text was entered.
risks: assistant content can become stale relative to active filters
conversation controls can be confusing when history is empty
smokeScenarios: Drawer renders with heading, history area, and input.
functionalScenarios: Ask EOS flows use the selected insight context.
History updates after a successful conversation.
negativeScenarios: Empty input should not submit.
Backend failures should not leave the drawer unusable.
edgeScenarios: Long summaries do not overflow cards.
Many history items remain navigable.
accessibilityObservations: Visible headings and button labels exist.
Complex drawer semantics were not fully tested.
notes: No prior chats were present during the inspection.

description: Two-pane review workspace combining a date-grouped observation list with a selected-day hourly exploration area.
visibleValidationsOrConstraints: Sort order text was visible.
Reset Timeline was disabled in the observed state.
risks: selected day and detail content can drift apart
time filtering can create confusing empty states
smokeScenarios: Selecting a day updates the right-side detail context.
functionalScenarios: Sort order changes the visible day sequence.
Time filter affects the visible observation subset.
negativeScenarios: Empty selected-day results should show a clear state.
Reset should not drop unrelated filters silently.
edgeScenarios: Large date ranges remain scrollable.
Dense observation days still surface counts and category icons clearly.
accessibilityObservations: Visible headings, counters, and filter triggers exist.
Two-pane keyboard navigation was not fully tested.
notes: This entry covers the high-level review pattern rather than the media viewer inside it.

description: Selected-record detail area with media, status, tabs, comments, helper text, and grouped metadata sections.

whereFound.routeOrLocationHint: Right detail pane for the selected observation
Right detail pane for the selected action

visibleValidationsOrConstraints: Comment area showed a 1000-char counter.
Comment attachments said max 5MB each.
Action evidence said images and PDFs allowed, max 10MB each.
risks: editable and read-only controls are mixed closely together
broken media or upload flows can destabilize the panel
smokeScenarios: Selecting a record updates the detail area.
Expected sections render for the chosen record type.
functionalScenarios: Detail metadata matches the selected card.
Tab and comment areas stay scoped to the active record.
negativeScenarios: Missing record data should not leave unlabeled gaps.
Disabled controls should not accept edits.
edgeScenarios: Long descriptions remain scrollable.
Large linked-content sections do not collapse surrounding controls.
accessibilityObservations: Section headings are visible.
Nested interactive controls need deeper keyboard review.
notes: No create, update, upload, or comment submission was executed.

description: Top-of-list toolbar with bulk actions, export, create entry points, quick toggles, counts, and sort controls.

whereFound.routeOrLocationHint: Filter bar and Custom Report entry

visibleValidationsOrConstraints: Bulk Update and Drafts were disabled in the observed state.
Sort hint text was visible.
risks: enabled state can become inconsistent when selections change
mutating actions sit close to read-only inspection controls
smokeScenarios: Sort and filter controls remain accessible.
functionalScenarios: Bulk actions enable only with valid selections.
View toggles switch the content beneath the toolbar.
negativeScenarios: Disabled actions should not execute.
Unauthorized actions should not expose editable states.
edgeScenarios: Long labels do not wrap badly.
Large result sets keep the toolbar responsive.
accessibilityObservations: Mixed text and icon controls are visible.
Several icon-only controls need explicit label review.
notes: Create Action, Add Observation, Mark All Read, Clear All, and export were intentionally not executed.

description: Scrollable master list of cards or rows representing observations, actions, or reports with summary metadata.
visibleValidationsOrConstraints: Observation list supported Select all for Bulk Update.
Some checkboxes were disabled for certain records.
risks: selection state can be lost while paging
disabled selectability can be unclear without explanation
smokeScenarios: Records render with title and metadata.
Clicking a record opens detail context.
functionalScenarios: Checkbox selection updates bulk-action state.
Different list variants preserve their associated metadata.
negativeScenarios: Disabled checkboxes should not toggle.
Broken thumbnails should not hide text metadata.
edgeScenarios: Very long titles wrap without overlap.
Large result sets remain scrollable and pageable.
accessibilityObservations: Textual metadata is present on cards.
Focus behavior for nested interactive regions needs follow-up.
notes: Observations, actions, and report cards were merged because the master-detail pattern is strongly reused.

description: Page navigator with previous/next buttons, numbered pages, ellipsis, and a visible results summary.
visibleValidationsOrConstraints: Result summary was shown as Result: start - end of total.
risks: active page can desync from the visible list
changing filters can leave the pager on an invalid page
smokeScenarios: Next page changes the result slice when enabled.
functionalScenarios: Current page button tracks the displayed records.
Boundary states disable the correct arrow button.
negativeScenarios: Disabled arrows should not navigate.
Filter changes should not leave the pager invalid.
edgeScenarios: Single-page result sets remain stable.
Large page counts with ellipsis stay usable.
accessibilityObservations: Buttons expose readable text or labels in most cases.
Active-page announcement was not verified.
notes: Observed across most list-centric modules.

description: Side drawer that shows an audit-style chronological history for the selected action or assistant session area.

whereFound.routeOrLocationHint: History button in action detail pane

visibleValidationsOrConstraints: None visible.
risks: history ordering can be confusing if timestamps are inconsistent
overlay drawers may obscure underlying controls
smokeScenarios: At least one event item or an empty state is visible.
functionalScenarios: History items are scoped to the selected context.
Close control dismisses the drawer cleanly.
negativeScenarios: Missing history should show an empty state.
Repeated open-close actions should not duplicate overlays.
edgeScenarios: Long histories remain scrollable.
Long event descriptions wrap cleanly.
accessibilityObservations: Drawer title is visible.
Focus trapping and dismissal shortcuts were not fully validated.
notes: The actions drawer showed a clear chronological audit trail.

description: Custom report dialog with required start/end dates and optional user selection.
visibleValidationsOrConstraints: Start Date and End Date were marked required.
Generate Report stayed disabled until required inputs were satisfied.
risks: date validation can permit invalid ranges
generate button state may lag after selection
functionalScenarios: Required fields gate Generate Report.
Selected users are included in the request context.
negativeScenarios: Generate should not proceed with missing dates.
Closing the modal should not leak partial input unexpectedly.
edgeScenarios: Wide date ranges remain valid if supported.
Large user lists remain usable.
accessibilityObservations: Required labels are visible.
Dialog focus trapping was not fully tested.
notes: The generation action itself was intentionally not executed.

description: Dedicated notifications workspace with summary cards, tabbed feeds, filter dropdown, mute switch, and global actions.
visibleValidationsOrConstraints: Observation and Action tabs showed unread counts.
Mute, Mark All Read, and Clear All controls were visible.
risks: unread badges can drift from actual feed state
global actions can be destructive if they lack confirmation
smokeScenarios: Notification center opens with summary counts and tabs.
functionalScenarios: Counts align with displayed feed totals.
Filter dropdown scopes the current feed.
negativeScenarios: Global actions should not execute accidentally.
Empty-state handling should be clear when a tab has no items.
edgeScenarios: High unread counts remain readable.
Large feeds stay pageable and performant.
accessibilityObservations: Headings and tab labels are visible.
Mute switch and icon-only actions need follow-up.
notes: Destructive global actions were intentionally not triggered.

description: Single notification row with message text, time, location metadata, unread state, and item-level icon actions.
visibleValidationsOrConstraints: Item-level view and clear controls were exposed as icon buttons.
risks: relative and absolute timestamps can be inconsistent
icon-only actions can be ambiguous
smokeScenarios: Feed item shows message, time, and location metadata.
functionalScenarios: Opening the item reaches the related record context.
Clearing one item updates the feed correctly.
negativeScenarios: Broken record references should fail gracefully.
Repeated clear actions should not remove the wrong item.
edgeScenarios: Long notification text wraps cleanly.
Mixed relative and absolute times remain understandable.
accessibilityObservations: Readable notification text is visible.
Item-level icon labeling needs review.
notes: Per-item actions were not executed.

description: Tabbed help area containing categorization cards, category-mapping cards, and a user-manual document slot.
visibleValidationsOrConstraints: None visible.
risks: broken assets can make one tab appear blank
route/asset errors can leave the manual frame empty
smokeScenarios: Selecting each tab swaps the content.
functionalScenarios: Category/mapping content stays aligned with the selected tab.
The User Manual tab attempts to load its document.
negativeScenarios: Missing reference assets should fail gracefully.
Rapid tab switching should not leave stale content behind.
edgeScenarios: Long category lists remain readable.
Mixed media/document content does not break layout.
accessibilityObservations: Tab semantics were exposed in the snapshot.
The iframe did not expose a visible title.
notes: Console logs indicated a route/asset error for the user-manual PDF, so inline document behavior is partially uncertain.
